specific_question: Between April 1 and June 30, 2025, how did Lee’s Market use design apps to improve visual consistency?
answer: During Q2 2025, Lee’s Market’s marketing team used design applications to create uniform templates and visuals across live chat banners, and text campaigns. This ensured brand consistency and reduced design turnaround times by 15%.
